Roll Bounce (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,380,866Details
International Box Office $52,206
Worldwide Box Office $17,433,072
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,570,366 (43.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,625 opening theaters/1,661 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $32,426,227

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 23rd, 2005 (Wide) by Fox Searchlight
Video Release: December 13th, 2005
MPA Rating: PG-13 for language and some crude humor.
Running Time: 107 minutes
Geographical setting: Chicago
Plot point: Coming of Age
Social setting: Roller Skating, Slobs vs. Snobs
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Time period setting: 1970s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Fox Searchlight Pictures, Fox 2000 Pictures, State Street Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
